revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Globalize/name]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Globalize/name]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

{{#ifeq: {{{2|name}}}|name| <!-- Displayname or category name--> |{{#switch: {{lc:{{{1}}}}}<!--Add countries with multiple names here--> |usa |the usa |us |the us |the united states |united states |united states of america |the united states of america = USA |anglophone |english |english speaking world |anglosphere |the english-speaking world |english-speaking world |the english speaking world |eng |en=Anglophone |canada |canadian |ca=Canada |germany german |de=Germany |hong kong=Hong Kong |ireland |irish = Ireland |malaysian |malaysia=Malaysia |russia |russian |ru=Russia |scotish |scotland=Scotland |south africa |south african = South Africa |spain |spanish=Spain |uk |united kingdom |the united kingdom |the uk |british=United Kingdom |england |english=England |the west |western |western culture |west=Western culture |japan |japanese |ja=Japan |europe |european |eu=Europe |india |indian=India |china |chinese |cn=China |pakistan |pakistani=Pakistan |new zealand |nz=New Zealand |singapore |singaporean=Singapore |korea |korean |rok=Korea |france |french=France |northern |north |northern hemisphere |the north |the northern hemisphere=Northern |{{{1}}} <!--If name is not on list return the original-->}} |{{#switch: {{{1}}}<!--Add countries with different display names and category names here --> |USA=the United States |Anglophone=[[English-speaking world|the English-speaking world]] |Northern=the [[Northern Hemisphere]] |United Kingdom=the United Kingdom |{{{1}}} <!--If no other display name was found return the input--> }}}}

revision.comment: I think an extra pipe messed up evrything
revision.text: {{#ifeq: {{{2|name}}}|name <!-- Displayname or category name--> |{{#switch: {{lc:{{{1}}}}}<!--Add countries with multiple names here--> |usa |the usa |us |the us |the united states |united states |united states of america |the united states of america = USA |anglophone |english |english speaking world |anglosphere |the english-speaking world |english-speaking world |the english speaking world |eng |en=Anglophone |canada |canadian |ca=Canada |germany german |de=Germany |hong kong=Hong Kong |ireland |irish = Ireland |malaysian |malaysia=Malaysia |russia |russian |ru=Russia |scotish |scotland=Scotland |south africa |south african = South Africa |spain |spanish=Spain |uk |united kingdom |the united kingdom |the uk |british=United Kingdom |england |english=England |the west |western |western culture |west=Western culture |japan |japanese |ja=Japan |europe |european |eu=Europe |india |indian=India |china |chinese |cn=China |pakistan |pakistani=Pakistan |new zealand |nz=New Zealand |singapore |singaporean=Singapore |korea |korean |rok=Korea |france |french=France |northern |north |northern hemisphere |the north |the northern hemisphere=Northern |{{{1}}} <!--If name is not on list return the original-->}} |{{#switch: {{{1}}}<!--Add countries with different display names and category names here --> |USA=the United States |Anglophone=[[English-speaking world|the English-speaking world]] |Northern=the [[Northern Hemisphere]] |United Kingdom=the United Kingdom |{{{1}}} <!--If no other display name was found return the input--> }}}}

{{#ifeq: {{{2|name}}}|name <!-- Displayname or category name--> |{{#switch: {{lc:{{{1}}}}}<!--Add countries with multiple names here--> |usa |the usa |us |the us |the united states |united states |united states of america |the united states of america = USA |anglophone |english |english speaking world |anglosphere |the english-speaking world |english-speaking world |the english speaking world |eng |en=Anglophone |canada |canadian |ca=Canada |germany german |de=Germany |hong kong=Hong Kong |ireland |irish = Ireland |malaysian |malaysia=Malaysia |russia |russian |ru=Russia |scotish |scotland=Scotland |south africa |south african = South Africa |spain |spanish=Spain |uk |united kingdom |the united kingdom |the uk |british=United Kingdom |england |english=England |the west |western |western culture |west=Western culture |japan |japanese |ja=Japan |europe |european |eu=Europe |india |indian=India |china |chinese |cn=China |pakistan |pakistani=Pakistan |new zealand |nz=New Zealand |singapore |singaporean=Singapore |korea |korean |rok=Korea |france |french=France |northern |north |northern hemisphere |the north |the northern hemisphere=Northern |{{{1}}} <!--If name is not on list return the original-->}} |{{#switch: {{User:Trialpears/sandbox/Globalize/name|{{{1}}}}}<!--Add countries with different display names and category names here --> |USA=the United States |Anglophone=[[English-speaking world|the English-speaking world]] |Northern=the [[Northern Hemisphere]] |United Kingdom=the United Kingdom |{{{1}}} <!--If no other display name was found return the input--> }}}}

revision.comment: If no displayname give cat name
revision.text: {{#ifeq: {{{2|name}}}|name <!-- Displayname or category name--> |{{#switch: {{lc:{{{1}}}}}<!--Add countries with multiple names here--> |usa |the usa |us |the us |the united states |united states |united states of america |the united states of america = USA |anglophone |english |english speaking world |anglosphere |the english-speaking world |english-speaking world |the english speaking world |eng |en=Anglophone |canada |canadian |ca=Canada |germany german |de=Germany |hong kong=Hong Kong |ireland |irish = Ireland |malaysian |malaysia=Malaysia |russia |russian |ru=Russia |scotish |scotland=Scotland |south africa |south african = South Africa |spain |spanish=Spain |uk |united kingdom |the united kingdom |the uk |british=United Kingdom |england |english=England |the west |western |western culture |west=Western culture |japan |japanese |ja=Japan |europe |european |eu=Europe |india |indian=India |china |chinese |cn=China |pakistan |pakistani=Pakistan |new zealand |nz=New Zealand |singapore |singaporean=Singapore |korea |korean |rok=Korea |france |french=France |northern |north |northern hemisphere |the north |the northern hemisphere=Northern |{{{1}}} <!--If name is not on list return the original-->}} |{{#switch: {{User:Trialpears/sandbox/Globalize/name|{{{1}}}}}<!--Add countries with different display names and category names here --> |USA=the United States |Anglophone=[[English-speaking world|the English-speaking world]] |Northern=the [[Northern Hemisphere]] |United Kingdom=the United Kingdom |{{User:Trialpears/sandbox/Globalize/name|{{{1}}}}} <!--If no other display name was found return the input--> }}}}

revision.comment: Change USA category to United States
revision.text: {{#ifeq: {{{2|name}}}|name <!-- Displayname or category name--> |{{#switch: {{lc:{{{1|}}}}}<!--Add countries with multiple names here--> |usa |the usa |us |the us |the united states |united states |united states of america |the united states of america = United States |anglophone |english |english speaking world |anglosphere |the english-speaking world |english-speaking world |the english speaking world |eng |the anglophone countries |en=Anglophone |canada |canadian |ca=Canada |germany |german |de=Germany |hong kong=Hong Kong |ireland |irish = Ireland |malaysian |malaysia=Malaysia |russia |russian |ru=Russia |scotish |scotland=Scotland |south africa |south african = South Africa |spain |spanish=Spain |uk |united kingdom |the united kingdom |the uk |british |britain=United Kingdom |england |english=England |the west |western |western culture |west=Western culture |japan |japanese |ja=Japan |europe |european |the european union |european union |eu=Europe |india |indian=India |china |chinese |cn=China |pakistan |pakistani=Pakistan |new zealand |nz=New Zealand |singapore |singaporean=Singapore |korea |korean |rok=Korea |france |french=France |northern |north |northern hemisphere |the north |the northern hemisphere=Northern |{{{1|}}} <!--If name is not on list return the original-->}}|}}{{#ifeq: {{{2|name}}}|name|| {{#switch: {{{1|}}}<!--Add countries with different display names and category names here --> |USA=the United States |Anglophone=[[English-speaking world|the English-speaking world]] |Northern=the [[Northern Hemisphere]] |United Kingdom=the United Kingdom |{{{1|}}} <!--If no other display name was found return the input--> }}}}<noinclude>{{documentation|content=This sub-template is intended to simplify the code of the main template by moving the alternative name logic.}}

{{#ifeq: {{{2|name}}}|name <!-- Displayname or category name--> |{{#switch: {{lc:{{{1|}}}}}<!--Add countries with multiple names here--> |usa |the usa |us |u.s. |the us |the united states |united states |united states of america |the united states of america = United States |anglophone |english |english speaking world |anglosphere |the english-speaking world |english-speaking world |the english speaking world |eng |the anglophone countries |en=Anglophone |canada |canadian |ca=Canada |germany |german |de=Germany |hong kong=Hong Kong |ireland |irish = Ireland |malaysian |malaysia=Malaysia |russia |russian |ru=Russia |scotish |scotland=Scotland |south africa |south african = South Africa |spain |spanish=Spain |uk |united kingdom |the united kingdom |the uk |british |britain=United Kingdom |england |english=England |the west |western |western culture |west=Western culture |japan |japanese |ja=Japan |europe |european |the european union |european union |eu=Europe |india |indian=India |china |chinese |cn=China |pakistan |pakistani=Pakistan |new zealand |nz=New Zealand |singapore |singaporean=Singapore |korea |korean |rok=Korea |france |french=France |northern |north |northern hemisphere |the north |the northern hemisphere=Northern |{{{1|}}} <!--If name is not on list return the original-->}}|}}{{#ifeq: {{{2|name}}}|name|| {{#switch: {{{1|}}}<!--Add countries with different display names and category names here --> |USA=the United States |Anglophone=[[English-speaking world|the English-speaking world]] |Northern=the [[Northern Hemisphere]] |United Kingdom=the United Kingdom |{{{1|}}} <!--If no other display name was found return the input--> }}}}<noinclude>{{documentation|content=This sub-template is intended to simplify the code of the main template by moving the alternative name logic.}}

revision.comment: Noinclude properly. Luckily it didn't cause any problems
revision.text: {{#ifeq: {{{2|name}}}|name <!-- Displayname or category name--> |{{#switch: {{lc:{{{1|}}}}}<!--Add countries with multiple names here--> |usa |the usa |us |u.s. |the us |the united states |united states |united states of america |the united states of america = United States |anglophone |english |english speaking world |anglosphere |the english-speaking world |english-speaking world |the english speaking world |eng |the anglophone countries |en=Anglophone |canada |canadian |ca=Canada |germany |german |de=Germany |hong kong=Hong Kong |ireland |irish = Ireland |malaysian |malaysia=Malaysia |russia |russian |ru=Russia |scotish |scotland=Scotland |south africa |south african = South Africa |spain |spanish=Spain |uk |united kingdom |the united kingdom |the uk |british |britain=United Kingdom |england |english=England |the west |western |western culture |west=Western culture |japan |japanese |ja=Japan |europe |european |the european union |european union |eu=Europe |india |indian=India |china |chinese |cn=China |pakistan |pakistani=Pakistan |new zealand |nz=New Zealand |singapore |singaporean=Singapore |korea |korean |rok=Korea |france |french=France |northern |north |northern hemisphere |the north |the northern hemisphere=Northern |{{{1|}}} <!--If name is not on list return the original-->}}|}}{{#ifeq: {{{2|name}}}|name|| {{#switch: {{{1|}}}<!--Add countries with different display names and category names here --> |USA=the United States |Anglophone=[[English-speaking world|the English-speaking world]] |Northern=the [[Northern Hemisphere]] |United Kingdom=the United Kingdom |{{{1|}}} <!--If no other display name was found return the input--> }}}}<noinclude>{{documentation|content=This sub-template is intended to simplify the code of the main template by moving the alternative name logic.}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: added "the" before "United Kingdom" and "United States" for grammatical correctness in the template message
revision.text: {{#ifeq: {{{2|name}}}|name <!-- Displayname or category name--> |{{#switch: {{lc:{{{1|}}}}}<!--Add countries with multiple names here--> |usa |the usa |us |u.s. |the us |the united states |united states |united states of america |the united states of america = the United States |anglophone |english |english speaking world |anglosphere |the english-speaking world |english-speaking world |the english speaking world |eng |the anglophone countries |en=Anglophone |canada |canadian |ca=Canada |germany |german |de=Germany |hong kong=Hong Kong |ireland |irish = Ireland |malaysian |malaysia=Malaysia |russia |russian |ru=Russia |scotish |scotland=Scotland |south africa |south african = South Africa |spain |spanish=Spain |uk |united kingdom |the united kingdom |the uk |british |britain=the United Kingdom |england |english=England |the west |western |western culture |west=Western culture |japan |japanese |ja=Japan |europe |european |the european union |european union |eu=Europe |india |indian=India |china |chinese |cn=China |pakistan |pakistani=Pakistan |new zealand |nz=New Zealand |singapore |singaporean=Singapore |korea |korean |rok=Korea |france |french=France |northern |north |northern hemisphere |the north |the northern hemisphere=Northern |{{{1|}}} <!--If name is not on list return the original-->}}|}}{{#ifeq: {{{2|name}}}|name|| {{#switch: {{{1|}}}<!--Add countries with different display names and category names here --> |USA=the United States |Anglophone=[[English-speaking world|the English-speaking world]] |Northern=the [[Northern Hemisphere]] |United Kingdom=the United Kingdom |{{{1|}}} <!--If no other display name was found return the input--> }}}}<noinclude>{{documentation|content=This sub-template is intended to simplify the code of the main template by moving the alternative name logic.}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Fix the display name of "the" United States, some comments in the code to avoid similar mistakes in the future, avoid a confusing duple negative.
revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{{2|name}}}|name|<!--
Category names
-->{{#switch: {{lc:{{{1|}}}}}<!--Add countries with multiple names here--> |usa |the usa |us |u.s. |the us |the united states |united states |united states of america |the united states of america = United States <!-- If the category name is changed, update the display name section below--> |anglophone |english |english speaking world |anglosphere |the english-speaking world |english-speaking world |the english speaking world |eng |the anglophone countries |en=Anglophone <!-- If the category name is changed, update the display name section below--> |canada |canadian |ca=Canada |germany |german |de=Germany |hong kong=Hong Kong |ireland |irish = Ireland |malaysian |malaysia=Malaysia |russia |russian |ru=Russia |scotish |scotland=Scotland |south africa |south african = South Africa |spain |spanish=Spain |uk |united kingdom |the united kingdom |the uk |british |britain=United Kingdom <!-- If the category name is changed, update the display name section below--> |england |english=England |the west |western |western culture |west=Western culture |japan |japanese |ja=Japan |europe |european |the european union |european union |eu=Europe |india |indian=India |china |chinese |cn=China |pakistan |pakistani=Pakistan |new zealand |nz=New Zealand |singapore |singaporean=Singapore |korea |korean |rok=Korea |france |french=France |northern |north |northern hemisphere |the north |the northern hemisphere=Northern <!-- If the category name is changed, update the display name section below--> |{{{1|}}} <!--If name is not on list return the original-->}}|}}<!--
Display names
-->{{#ifeq: {{{2|name}}}|displayname|{{#switch: {{{1|}}}<!-- Add countries with different display names and category names below--> |United States=the United States |Anglophone=[[English-speaking world|the English-speaking world]] |Northern=the [[Northern Hemisphere]] |United Kingdom=the United Kingdom |{{{1|}}} <!--If no other display name was found return the input--> }}}}<noinclude>{{documentation|content=This sub-template is intended to simplify the code of the main template by moving the alternative name logic.}}</noinclude>

{{#ifeq: {{{2|name}}}|name|<!--
Category names
-->{{#switch: {{lc:{{{1|}}}}}<!--Add countries with multiple names here--> |usa |the usa |us |u.s. |the us |the united states |united states |united states of america |the united states of america = United States <!-- If the category name is changed, update the display name section below--> |anglophone |english |english speaking world |anglosphere |the english-speaking world |english-speaking world |the english speaking world |eng |the anglophone countries |en=Anglophone <!-- If the category name is changed, update the display name section below--> |canada |canadian |ca=Canada |germany |german |de=Germany |hong kong=Hong Kong |ireland |irish = Ireland |malaysian |malaysia=Malaysia |russia |russian |ru=Russia |scotish |scotland=Scotland |south africa |south african = South Africa |spain |spanish=Spain |uk |united kingdom |the united kingdom |the uk |british |britain=United Kingdom <!-- If the category name is changed, update the display name section below--> |england |english=England |the west |western |western culture |west=Western culture |japan |japanese |ja=Japan |europe |european |the european union |european union |eu=Europe |india |indian=India |china |chinese |cn=China |pakistan |pakistani=Pakistan |new zealand |nz=New Zealand |singapore |singaporean=Singapore |korea |korean |rok=Korea |france |french=France |northern |north |northern hemisphere |the north |the northern hemisphere=Northern <!-- If the category name is changed, update the display name section below--> |{{{1|}}} <!--If name is not on list return the original-->}}|}}<!--
Display names
-->{{#ifeq: {{{2|name}}}|displayname|{{#switch: {{{1|}}}<!-- Add countries with different display names and category names below--> |United States=the United States |Anglophone=[[English-speaking world|the English-speaking world]] |Northern=the [[Northern Hemisphere]] |United Kingdom=the United Kingdom |{{{1|}}} <!--If no other display name was found return the input--> }}}}<noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: per edit request on talk page - include "western world" and "the western world"
revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{{2|name}}}|name|<!--
Category names
-->{{#switch: {{lc:{{{1|}}}}}<!--Add countries with multiple names here--> |usa |the usa |us |u.s. |the us |the united states |united states |united states of america |the united states of america = United States <!-- If the category name is changed, update the display name section below--> |anglophone |english |english speaking world |anglosphere |the english-speaking world |english-speaking world |the english speaking world |eng |the anglophone countries |en=Anglophone <!-- If the category name is changed, update the display name section below--> |canada |canadian |ca=Canada |germany |german |de=Germany |hong kong=Hong Kong |ireland |irish = Ireland |malaysian |malaysia=Malaysia |russia |russian |ru=Russia |scotish |scotland=Scotland |south africa |south african = South Africa |spain |spanish=Spain |uk |united kingdom |the united kingdom |the uk |british |britain=United Kingdom <!-- If the category name is changed, update the display name section below--> |england |english=England |the west |western |western culture |western world |the western world |west=Western culture |japan |japanese |ja=Japan |europe |european |the european union |european union |eu=Europe |india |indian=India |china |chinese |cn=China |pakistan |pakistani=Pakistan |new zealand |nz=New Zealand |singapore |singaporean=Singapore |korea |korean |rok=Korea |france |french=France |northern |north |northern hemisphere |the north |the northern hemisphere=Northern <!-- If the category name is changed, update the display name section below--> |{{{1|}}} <!--If name is not on list return the original-->}}|}}<!--

-->{{#ifeq: {{{2|name}}}|displayname|{{#switch: {{{1|}}}<!-- Add countries with different display names and category names below--> |United States=the United States |Anglophone=[[English-speaking world|the English-speaking world]] |Northern=the [[Northern Hemisphere]] |United Kingdom=the United Kingdom |{{{1|}}} <!--If no other display name was found return the input--> }}}}<noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{{2|name}}}|name|<!--
Category names
-->{{#switch: {{lc:{{{1|}}}}}<!--Add countries with multiple names here--> |usa |the usa |us |u.s. |the us |the united states |united states |united states of america |the united states of america = United States <!-- If the category name is changed, update the display name section below--> |anglophone |english |english speaking world |anglosphere |the english-speaking world |english-speaking world |the english speaking world |eng |the anglophone countries |en=Anglophone <!-- If the category name is changed, update the display name section below--> |canada |canadian |ca=Canada |germany |german |de=Germany |hong kong=Hong Kong |ireland |irish = Ireland |malaysian |malaysia=Malaysia |russia |russian |ru=Russia |scotish |scotland=Scotland |south africa |south african = South Africa |spain |spanish=Spain |uk |united kingdom |the united kingdom |the uk |british |britain=United Kingdom <!-- If the category name is changed, update the display name section below--> |england |english=England |the west |western |western culture |western world |the western world |west=Western culture |japan |japanese |ja=Japan |europe |european |the european union |european union |eu=Europe |india |indian=India |china |chinese |cn=China |pakistan |pakistani=Pakistan |new zealand |nz=New Zealand |singapore |singaporean=Singapore |korea |korean |rok=Korea |philippines |the philippines=Philippines |france |french=France |northern |north |northern hemisphere |the north |the northern hemisphere=Northern <!-- If the category name is changed, update the display name section below--> |{{{1|}}} <!--If name is not on list return the original-->}}|}}<!--
Display names
-->{{#ifeq: {{{2|name}}}|displayname|{{#switch: {{{1|}}}<!-- Add countries with different display names and category names below--> |United States=the United States |Anglophone=[[English-speaking world|the English-speaking world]] |Northern=the [[Northern Hemisphere]] |United Kingdom=the United Kingdom |Philippines=the Philippines |{{{1|}}} <!--If no other display name was found return the input--> }}}}<noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{{2|name}}}|name|<!--
Category names
-->{{#switch: {{lc:{{{1|}}}}}<!--Add countries with multiple names here--> |usa |the usa |us |u.s. |the us |the united states |united states |united states of america |the united states of america = United States <!-- If the category name is changed, update the display name section below--> |anglophone |english |english speaking world |anglosphere |the english-speaking world |english-speaking world |the english speaking world |eng |the anglophone countries |en=Anglophone <!-- If the category name is changed, update the display name section below--> |canada |canadian |ca=Canada |germany |german |de=Germany |hong kong=Hong Kong |ireland |irish = Ireland |malaysian |malaysia=Malaysia |russia |russian |ru=Russia |scotish |scotland=Scotland |south africa |south african = South Africa |spain |spanish=Spain |uk |united kingdom |the united kingdom |the uk |british |britain=United Kingdom <!-- If the category name is changed, update the display name section below--> |england |english=England |the west |western |western culture |western world |the western world |west=Western culture |japan |japanese |ja=Japan |europe |european |the european union |european union |eu=Europe |india |indian=India |china |chinese |cn=China |pakistan |pakistani=Pakistan |new zealand |nz=New Zealand |singapore |singaporean=Singapore |korea |korean |rok=Korea |philippines |the philippines=Philippines |france |french=France |northern |north |northern hemisphere |the north |the northern hemisphere=Northern <!-- If the category name is changed, update the display name section below--> |{{{1|}}} <!--If name is not on list return the original-->}}|}}<!--
Display names
-->{{#ifeq: {{{2|name}}}|displayname|{{#switch: {{{1|}}}<!-- Add countries with different display names and category names below--> |United States=the United States |Anglophone=[[English-speaking world|the English-speaking world]] |Northern=the [[Northern Hemisphere]] |United Kingdom=the United Kingdom |Philippines=the Philippines |{{{1|}}} <!--If no other display name was found return the input--> }}}}<noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{{2|name}}}|name|<!--
Category names
-->{{#switch: {{lc:{{{1|}}}}}<!--Add countries with multiple names here--> |usa |the usa |us |u.s. |the us |the united states |united states |united states of america |the united states of america = United States <!-- If the category name is changed, update the display name section below--> |anglophone |english |english speaking world |anglosphere |the english-speaking world |english-speaking world |the english speaking world |eng |the anglophone countries |en=Anglophone <!-- If the category name is changed, update the display name section below--> |canada |canadian |ca=Canada |germany |german |de=Germany |hong kong=Hong Kong |ireland |irish = Ireland |malaysian |malaysia=Malaysia |russia |russian |ru=Russia |scotish |scotland=Scotland |south africa |south african = South Africa |spain |spanish=Spain |uk |united kingdom |the united kingdom |the uk |british |britain=United Kingdom <!-- If the category name is changed, update the display name section below--> |england |english=England |the west |western |western culture |western world |the western world |west=Western culture |japan |japanese |ja=Japan |europe |european |the european union |european union |eu=Europe |india |indian=India |china |chinese |cn=China |pakistan |pakistani=Pakistan |new zealand |nz=New Zealand |singapore |singaporean=Singapore |korea |korean |rok=Korea |philippines |the philippines=Philippines |france |french=France |northern |north |northern hemisphere |the north |the northern hemisphere=Northern <!-- If the category name is changed, update the display name section below--> |{{{1|}}} <!--If name is not on list return the original-->}}|}}<!--
Display names
-->{{#ifeq: {{{2|name}}}|displayname|{{#switch: {{{1|}}}<!-- Add countries with different display names and category names below--> |United States=the United States |Anglophone=[[English-speaking world|the English-speaking world]] |Northern=the [[Northern Hemisphere]] |United Kingdom=the United Kingdom |Philippines=the Philippines |{{{1|}}} <!--If no other display name was found return the input--> }}}}<noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23417362209|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{{2|name}}}|name|<!--
Category names
-->{{#switch: {{lc:{{{1|}}}}}<!--Add countries with multiple names here--> |usa |the usa |us |u.s. |the us |the united states |united states |united states of america |the united states of america = United States <!-- If the category name is changed, update the display name section below--> |anglophone |english |english speaking world |anglosphere |the english-speaking world |english-speaking world |the english speaking world |eng |the anglophone countries |en=Anglophone <!-- If the category name is changed, update the display name section below--> |canada |canadian |ca=Canada |germany |german |de=Germany |hong kong=Hong Kong |ireland |irish = Ireland |malaysian |malaysia=Malaysia |russia |russian |ru=Russia |scotish |scotland=Scotland |south africa |south african = South Africa |spain |spanish=Spain |uk |united kingdom |the united kingdom |the uk |british |britain=United Kingdom <!-- If the category name is changed, update the display name section below--> |england |english=England |the west |western |western culture |western world |the western world |west=Western culture |japan |japanese |ja=Japan |europe |european |the european union |european union |eu=Europe |india |indian=India |china |chinese |cn=China |pakistan |pakistani=Pakistan |new zealand |nz=New Zealand |singapore |singaporean=Singapore |korea |korean |rok=Korea |philippines |the philippines=Philippines |france |french=France |northern |north |northern hemisphere |the north |the northern hemisphere=Northern <!-- If the category name is changed, update the display name section below--> |{{{1|}}} <!--If name is not on list return the original-->}}|}}<!--

-->{{#ifeq: {{{2|name}}}|displayname|{{#switch: {{{1|}}}<!-- Add countries with different display names and category names below--> |United States=the United States |Anglophone=[[English-speaking world|the English-speaking world]] |Northern=the [[Northern Hemisphere]] |United Kingdom=the United Kingdom |Philippines=the Philippines |{{{1|}}} <!--If no other display name was found return the input--> }}}}<noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

-->{{#switch: {{lc:{{{1|}}}}}<!--Add countries with multiple names here--> |usa |the usa |us |u.s. |the us |the united states |united states |united states of america |the united states of america = United States <!-- If the category name is changed, update the display name section below--> |anglophone |english |english speaking world |anglosphere |the english-speaking world |english-speaking world |the english speaking world |eng |the anglophone countries |en=Anglophone <!-- If the category name is changed, update the display name section below--> |canada |canadian |ca=Canada |germany |german |de=Germany |hong kong=Hong Kong |ireland |irish = Ireland |malaysian |malaysia=Malaysia |russia |russian |ru=Russia |scotish |scotland=Scotland |south africa |south african = South Africa |spain |spanish=Spain |uk |united kingdom |the united kingdom |the uk |british |britain=United Kingdom <!-- If the category name is changed, update the display name section below--> |england |english=England |the west |western |western culture |western world |the western world |west=Western culture |japan |japanese |ja=Japan |europe |european |the european union |european union |eu=Europe |india |indian=India |china |chinese |cn=China |pakistan |pakistani=Pakistan |new zealand |nz=New Zealand |singapore |singaporean=Singapore |korea |korean |rok=Korea |philippines |the philippines=Philippines |france |french=France |northern |north |northern hemisphere |the north |the northern hemisphere=Northern <!-- If the category name is changed, update the display name section below--> |{{{1|}}} <!--If name is not on list return the original-->}}|}}<!--

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Globalize%2Fname here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Globalize%2Fname for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{#ifeq: {{{2|name}}}|name|<!--
Category names
-->{{#switch: {{lc:{{{1|}}}}}<!--Add countries with multiple names here--> |usa |the usa |us |u.s. |the us |the united states |united states |united states of america |the united states of america = United States <!-- If the category name is changed, update the display name section below--> |anglophone |english |english speaking world |anglosphere |the english-speaking world |english-speaking world |the english speaking world |eng |the anglophone countries |en=Anglophone <!-- If the category name is changed, update the display name section below--> |canada |canadian |ca=Canada |germany |german |de=Germany |hong kong=Hong Kong |ireland |irish = Ireland |malaysian |malaysia=Malaysia |russia |russian |ru=Russia |scotish |scotland=Scotland |south africa |south african = South Africa |spain |spanish=Spain |uk |united kingdom |the united kingdom |the uk |british |britain=United Kingdom <!-- If the category name is changed, update the display name section below--> |england |english=England |the west |western |western culture |western world |the western world |west=Western culture |japan |japanese |ja=Japan |europe |european |the european union |european union |eu=Europe |india |indian=India |china |chinese |cn=China |pakistan |pakistani=Pakistan |new zealand |nz=New Zealand |singapore |singaporean=Singapore |korea |korean |rok=Korea |philippines |the philippines=Philippines |france |french=France |northern |north |northern hemisphere |the north |the northern hemisphere=Northern <!-- If the category name is changed, update the display name section below--> |{{{1|}}} <!--If name is not on list return the original-->}}|}}<!--
Display names
-->{{#ifeq: {{{2|name}}}|displayname|{{#switch: {{{1|}}}<!-- Add countries with different display names and category names below--> |United States=the United States |Anglophone=[[English-speaking world|the English-speaking world]] |Northern=the [[Northern Hemisphere]] |United Kingdom=the United Kingdom |Philippines=the Philippines |{{{1|}}} <!--If no other display name was found return the input--> }}}}<noinclude>{{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Globalize%2Fname for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{#ifeq: {{{2|name}}}|name|{{#switch: {{lc:{{{1|}}}}} |usa |the usa |us |u.s. |the us |the united states |united states |united states of america |the united states of america = United States |anglophone |english |english speaking world |anglosphere |the english-speaking world |english-speaking world |the english speaking world |eng |the anglophone countries |en=Anglophone |canada |canadian |ca=Canada |germany |german |de=Germany |hong kong=Hong Kong |ireland |irish = Ireland |malaysian |malaysia=Malaysia |russia |russian |ru=Russia |scotish |scotland=Scotland |south africa |south african = South Africa |spain |spanish=Spain |uk |united kingdom |the united kingdom |the uk |british |britain=United Kingdom |england |english=England |the west |western |western culture |western world |the western world |west=Western culture |japan |japanese |ja=Japan |europe |european |the european union |european union |eu=Europe |india |indian=India |china |chinese |cn=China |pakistan |pakistani=Pakistan |new zealand |nz=New Zealand |singapore |singaporean=Singapore |korea |korean |rok=Korea |philippines |the philippines=Philippines |france |french=France |northern |north |northern hemisphere |the north |the northern hemisphere=Northern |{{{1|}}} }}|}}{{#ifeq: {{{2|name}}}|displayname|{{#switch: {{{1|}}} |United States=the United States |Anglophone=[[English-speaking world|the English-speaking world]] |Northern=the [[Northern Hemisphere]] |United Kingdom=the United Kingdom |Philippines=the Philippines |{{{1|}}} }}}}<noinclude>{{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
